name: FrostLineTrolley
shortDescription: Modern white cosmetic equipment trolley with sturdy metal frame. Two-shelf design, lockable wheels, hygienic surfaces.
description:
The FrostLineTrolley is a modern white cosmetic equipment trolley that combines organization and professional appearance.

Its strong metal frame guarantees reliability and durability. The two-shelf design allows for clear, organized storage of devices and supplies.

Equipped with four wheels that can also be locked, so it stands stably during use. The smooth surfaces are easy to keep clean, and the snow-white color and minimalist lines provide an elegant appearance.
metaDescription: FrostLineTrolley white cosmetic equipment trolley with sturdy metal frame. Two shelves, lockable wheels, easy to clean. Professional salon furniture.

final.headline: Interested in the FrostLineTrolley?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation, or order directly!

featureRows.headline: Why the FrostLineTrolley?
featureRows.subtitle: Stable, modern, and practical equipment trolley

features.title: Lockable wheels for maximum stability
features.description: The four wheels not only provide easy mobility but can also be locked, so the trolley stands stably during use. Ideal for safely placing devices and equipment.

features.title: Two-shelf organized storage
features.description: The two shelves allow for clear storage of devices and supplies. The hygienic, easy-to-clean surfaces ensure a consistently impeccable appearance.

faq.question: Does it need assembly?
faq.answer: Yes, minimal assembly is required: mount the shelves on the frame and attach the wheels. Assembly can be completed in a few minutes.

faq.question: How does it differ from the SnowlineTrolley and ArcticTrolley?
faq.answer: The FrostLineTrolley features a two-shelf design with lockable wheels. The SnowlineTrolley has three tempered glass shelves with an aluminum frame, while the ArcticTrolley has an open shelf system with a sturdy metal frame. All three trolleys are designed for professional salon use.

faq.question: How can it be cleaned?
faq.answer: The smooth surfaces can be easily wiped down with a damp cloth or surface disinfectant. The white color and minimalist design always ensure a clean appearance.
